page_content:
EPIB623 Epidemiologic Methods in Health Disparities Research (3 Credits)

An examination of the measurement, monitoring, analysis, and reporting of health disparities in the U.S. Through in-depth examples and class activities, students will learn about the state of health disparities, epidemiologic methods for health disparity assessments, and best practices for translating data on health disparities for policy makers. Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in SPHL602; or EPIB610.
